items.text:
The Caravan! I bet we'll meet
all kinds of new friends.

After being stuck in this place,
I'll enjoy travelling in luxury...

I've heard the food is good.
They'll have plenty of gravy for you.

items.comment: Upset, but flustered enough he has no idea what to say.

items.text:
Save the arguing for the King!
Or the ... Lord Chamberlain,
or whoever we can get to!
